title: Operational Inventory And Gap Analysis
objective: Catalog what exists, what half-exists, and what is genuinely missing before operational readiness work begins.
build_items: Produce existing_goblin_coverage.md with at least 8 subsystem rows.
Classify each subsystem as exists, partial, missing, or deferred.
Identify what P14 and P15 must build versus reuse.
checkpoint_targets: Inventory has at least 8 rows, each classified with artifact paths.
Gap analysis identifies what P14 and P15 must build.
exit_criteria: No ambiguity about what P14/P15 builds versus reuses.
